input: Create a content strategy for a B2B cybersecurity company targeting CISOs and security engineers. They have no content yet.
Generate 20 content ideas for a DTC skincare brand across blog, Instagram, TikTok, and email newsletter.
Turn this 2000-word blog post into 10 pieces of derivative content for social media, newsletter, and video.
Our blog gets 50K monthly visitors but only 200 email signups. Diagnose the content-to-conversion problem.
Build a multi-channel publishing plan for launching a new product feature. Cover blog, email, social, and community.
